characters.appearance: White, humanoid robot with a smooth, metallic surface, blue eyes, and a glowing blue circular core on its chest. Visible mechanical joints at the neck and torso.
Young adult woman with fair complexion, blonde hair with bangs, and numerous dark tattoos on her arms and hands.
characters.wardrobe: White short-sleeved t-shirt, clear-rimmed glasses, and multiple layered silver chain necklaces.
characters.demeanor: Casual, slightly hesitant, and engaged in the conversation.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: क्या कर रही हो? [What are you doing?]
Character B says: I burn candle. [I burn candle.]
Character A says: तुम्हें कहना चाहिए "I'm lighting a candle". [You should say "I'm lighting a candle".]
Character A says: तुम्हारी English practice कैसी चल रही है? [How is your English practice going?]
Character B says: उफ्फ... बस ठीक-ठाक। [Ugh... just so-so.]
Character A says: टेंशन मत लो। [Don't take tension.]
Character A says: रोज़ practice करोगी तो confidence आ जाएगा। [If you practice daily, confidence will come.]
Character A says: Supernova के AI tutor के साथ। [With Supernova's AI tutor.]
Character B says: AI tutor? पर मेरे पास महँगे courses के लिए पैसे नहीं हैं। [AI tutor? But I don't have money for expensive courses.]
Character A says: अरे! [Hey!]
Character A says: Supernova बहुत affordable है। [Supernova is very affordable.]
Character A says: इसमें तुम real-life situations की practice कर सकती हो। [In this, you can practice real-life situations.]
Character B says: सच में? [Really?]
Character A says: हाँ! चाहे interview हो या shopping, रोज़ाना बात करना सीखो। [Yes! Whether it's an interview or shopping, learn to converse daily.]
Character A says: अपने AI tutor के साथ। [With your AI tutor.]
Character A says: बिल्कुल एक असली teacher की तरह। [Exactly like a real teacher.]
Character B says: जो मेरी गलतियाँ भी बताएगा? [Who will also point out my mistakes?]
Character A says: बिल्कुल! ये तुम्हारी grammar और pronunciation ठीक करता है। [Exactly! It corrects your grammar and pronunciation.]
Character A says: ताकि तुम बिना डरे English बोल सको। [So that you can speak English without fear.]
Character B says: सही है... मैं अभी Supernova download करती हूँ। [That's great... I'll download Supernova right now.]
Character A says: Great decision! [Great decision!]
Character A says: चलो साथ में English बोलना सीखें। [Let's learn to speak English together.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable, real-time English correction.
- Introduces the common pain point of feeling "so-so" about English skills and worrying about the high cost of learning.
- Positions Supernova as an affordable, practical solution for real-world speaking practice with an AI tutor.
- Ends with a clear, encouraging call to action to download the app.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
क्या कर रही हो? (What are you doing?)
I burn candle.
तुम्हें कहना चाहिए "I'm lighting a candle". (You should say "I'm lighting a candle".)
तुम्हारी English practice कैसी चल रही है? (How is your English practice going?)
उफ्फ... बस ठीक-ठाक। (Ugh... just so-so.)
टेंशन मत लो। (Don't take tension.)
रोज़ practice करोगी तो confidence आ जाएगा। (If you practice daily, confidence will come.)
Supernova के AI tutor के साथ। (With Supernova's AI tutor.)
AI tutor? पर मेरे पास महँगे courses के लिए पैसे नहीं हैं। (AI tutor? But I don't have money for expensive courses.)
अरे! (Hey!)
Supernova बहुत affordable है। (Supernova is very affordable.)
इसमें तुम real-life situations की practice कर सकती हो। (In this, you can practice real-life situations.)
सच में? (Really?)
हाँ! चाहे interview हो या shopping, रोज़ाना बात करना सीखो। (Yes! Whether it's an interview or shopping, learn to converse daily.)
अपने AI tutor के साथ। (With your AI tutor.)
बिल्कुल एक असली teacher की तरह। (Exactly like a real teacher.)
जो मेरी गलतियाँ भी बताएगा? (Who will also point out my mistakes?)
बिल्कुल! ये तुम्हारी grammar और pronunciation ठीक करता है। (Exactly! It corrects your grammar and pronunciation.)
ताकि तुम बिना डरे English बोल सको। (So that you can speak English without fear.)
सही है... मैं अभी Supernova download करती हूँ। (That's great... I'll download Supernova right now.)
Great decision! (Great decision!)
चलो साथ में English बोलना सीखें। (Let's learn to speak English together.)

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: आज ही Supernova डाउनलोड करें! और confidence के साथ English बोलें। [Download Supernova today! And speak English with confidence.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers the final call to action.
- Reinforces the core brand promise of speaking English with confidence.
- Displays app store badges for easy conversion.
